comments.comment: Consider detailing the exact implementation features of the 'Two Images Side by Side' block, as it serves as the guide for improving other blocks.
Ensure this aspect is clearly defined in the original block to maintain consistency when applying enhancements to other blocks.
Highlight how color customization is implemented in the 'Two Images Side by Side' block to replicate its effectiveness.

commentOps.payloadSnippet: {"comments": [{"pattern": "#### 28\\. \\*\\*Two Images Side by Side\\*\\*", "comment": "Consider detailing the exact implementation features of the 'Two Images Side by Side' block, as it serves as the guide for improving other blocks."}, {"pattern": "\\*\\*Sizes\\*\\*: Adjustable image dimensions and spacing\\.", "comment": "Ensure this aspect is clearly defined in the original block to maintain consistency when applying enhancements to other blocks."}, {"pattern": "\\*\\*Colors\\*\\*: Background and border colors\\.", "comment": "Highlight how color customization is implemented in the 'Two Images Side by Side' block to replicate its effectiveness."}]}
